2606.02568.title: ClinEnv: An Interactive Multi-Stage Long Horizon EHR Environment for Agents
2606.02568.paper_summary: Clinical practice is not the selection of an answer from enumerated options: a physician gathers heterogeneous information incrementally and commits to sequential, irreversible decisions under uncertainty. Static benchmarks cannot probe and existing interactive medical benchmarks each compromise on at least one of them. We present ClinEnv, an interactive benchmark that evaluates LLMs as attending physicians over real inpatient admissions under a paradigm we term Longitudinal Inpatient Simulation. Each case is automatically constructed into an ordered sequence of decision stages; at every stage the model must actively query four specialized agents before committing to medications, procedures, and diagnoses. ClinEnv scores both what the model decides, through deterministic ontology-grounded matching, and how it gathers information. Across seven models, the strongest reaches only 0.31 decision F1, and outcome quality is sharply decoupled from process quality. Difficulty concentrates in management decisions and later stages, where models recover discharge diagnoses far more reliably than management actions (0.51 vs. 0.17 F1) and continue to issue redundant queries as cases progress. ClinEnv makes this information-acquisition gap, invisible to outcome-only evaluation, directly measurable.
2606.02568.paper_summary_zh: 臨床實踐並不是從列舉的選項中選擇一個答案：醫生逐步收集異質信息，並在不確定性下做出連續的、不可逆的決策。靜態基準無法深入探討，而現有的互動醫療基準在至少一個方面都存在妥協。我們提出了ClinEnv，一個互動基準，評估大型語言模型（LLMs）作為實際住院病人的主治醫生，在我們稱之為長期住院模擬的範式下進行評估。每個案例自動構建為一個有序的決策階段序列；在每個階段，模型必須在承諾用藥、程序和診斷之前，主動詢問四個專門的代理。ClinEnv評分模型的決策，通過確定性的本體匹配，以及它如何收集信息。在七個模型中，最強的模型僅達到0.31的決策F1，而結果質量與過程質量之間的關聯性非常薄弱。困難主要集中在管理決策和後期階段，模型在恢復出院診斷方面的可靠性遠高於管理行動（0.51對0.17 F1），並且隨著案例的進展，仍然持續發出冗餘查詢。ClinEnv使得這一信息獲取差距，在僅依賴結果的評估中是不可見的，變得可直接測量。
2606.02568.author: Yuxing Lu et.al.
2606.02568.authors: Yuxing Lu, Yushuhong Lin, Wenqi Shi, J. Ben Tamo, Xukai Zhao, Jinzhuo Wang, May Dongmei Wang
